items.title: Mugabe's son pleads guilty to pointing a gun in South Africa
items.dek: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.body: Bellarmine Mugabe was arrested in February following the shooting of a 23-year-old man at his home in Johannesburg.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Palestinians hand over suspect in 1982 attack on Jewish restaurant in Paris
items.dek: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.
items.body: Hicham Harb is suspected of directing the attack in the Rue des Rosiers and acting as one of the gunmen who shot at diners.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: WR Flowers: Harbaugh's practices led to injuries
items.dek: Ravens wideout Zay Flowers says "heavy" practices under former coach John Harbaugh were the reason why Baltimore "had a lot of injuries" last season.
items.body: Ravens wideout Zay Flowers says "heavy" practices under former coach John Harbaugh were the reason why Baltimore "had a lot of injuries" last season.
items.author: IriLine Desk
